creator: lightside@gmx.com
text:
Created attachment 174073
The x11-wm/fluxbox-devel port in shar archive

Added ".ifmake makesum" to "always include optional distfiles", when using `make makesum` command. This was proposed in bug 209742 comment #85 (attachment #173976) by Jan Beich for devel/godot port.

To Jason Helfman:
If you want, I can propose the same for x11-wm/fluxbox port.
